projectDescription: A self-hosted, privacy-first AI workspace featuring chat, autonomous agents, deep research, document editing, email, calendar, and local model management — all running on your own hardware.
keyFeatures: Chat with local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, OpenAI, OpenRouter, GitHub Copilot)
Autonomous agent loop with MCP tool support, web search, shell, file, and memory tools
Cookbook: hardware-aware model browser — scan, recommend, download, and serve models in one click
Deep Research: iterative Think→Search→Extract→Synthesize loop producing structured visual reports
Multi-tab document editor with AI-assisted edits (markdown, HTML, CSV, syntax highlighting)
IMAP/SMTP email inbox with AI triage: urgency scoring, auto-tagging, summaries, and reply drafts
CalDAV calendar with Radicale / Nextcloud / Apple / Fastmail sync
Persistent vector memory and agent skills using ChromaDB and fastembed
Notes, todos, and scheduled tasks with ntfy/email/browser notifications
Multi-user auth with per-user privilege controls and optional 2FA
PWA-ready responsive UI that works on mobile
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /cookbook — model scan, download, and serve
